dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent demonstrated high governance alignment by explicitly utilizing a rules-context-loader step and successfully validating outputs against the rule_context_schema and architecture_decision_record_schema.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The trace shows a logical progression from rule ingestion to decision record promotion. The high completion token count relative to prompt tokens suggests significant internal processing of causal relationships between rules and decisions.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The promotion to decision records (ADRs) indicates that the agent successfully synthesized architectural trade-offs into a structured format, as evidenced by the successful schema validation of the final decision record.
